description.value:
You and your partner outmaneuver your foes by taking advantage of your difference in size. When you and your ally who's a different size than you flank the same enemy, that enemy takes a –2 circumstance penalty to its DCs against [[/act disarm]], [[/act feint]], [[/act reposition]], [[/act shove]], [[/act trip]], and [[/act tumble-through]] attempts.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Above and Below]

value.value: You have a bond with the Sympathetic Bond feat or dragonkin partner bond feature.
